An artist impression of what a redeveloped Queensland Sport and Aquatic Centre could look like has been released to the public byThe Brisbane Times.

The sports centre could be used as the main stadium during the 2032 Brisbane Olympics and Chris O’Keefe isn’t impressed.

Listen to all of the Drive with Chris O’Keefe highlights here:

title: 'Bizarre': Chris O'Keefe reacts to artist impression of a redeveloped Queensland Sport and Aquatic Centre for 2032 Olympics
author: imogenhowell
